call_digest.call_type: Coaching / Testimony / Spiritual Deep-Dive - Number Four
emotional_peaks: Augusto's peace while being held under by waves.
top_truth_flips: We are in the Garden now, just eating the apple.
God used evil skills to train you for Kingdom work.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You aren't trying to find the Garden of Eden; you're living in it, you just won't stop eating the apple.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Moves peace from a future destination to a current choice.
nuggets.proof_quote: I would almost argue that we do have, we are in the Garden of Eden, constantly eating the apple. Because I can tap into God at any time.
hook_angles: Welcome to the Garden of Eden. Why are you still eating the apple?
Heaven on earth isn't a place. It's a choice.

objection_bank.objection_text: I'm afraid of what God will ask me to give up.
objection_bank.underlying_belief: God's plan is less satisfying than mine.
objection_bank.counter_truth_angle: Peace comes from surrender. release the need, and abundance follows.
objection_bank.transcript_proof_quote: I released the need. And as a result of it, they continue to come.

top_5_nuggets.one_liner: Stop picking apples and start enjoying the Garden.

creator_notes.tone: Vlog/Adventure spirit mixed with deep theology. (Reprocessed Run Number Four).
